summary: Crisp soundboard capture of an all‑time great, smoking 1983 show.
review: Reviewers rave that this Healy‑sourced tape sounds like one of the crispest recordings they’ve ever heard and praise the performance as a “great” and “smoker from the get‑go.” The soundboard source delivers clear, well‑balanced audio, making the historic concert highly enjoyable despite no specific song details being cited.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews are 5‑star and highlight both superb recording fidelity and an outstanding performance, indicating a top‑tier show with excellent sound quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as one of the crispest sounding recordings; clear, well‑balanced playback praised by multiple listeners.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewed as a consistently strong and energetic show – “a great show” and “smoker from the get‑go.”
